purpose: 验证 Workflow 列表页面基础渲染与状态切换能力

workflows.name: Deploy Staging
workflows.description: Automated staging deployment pipeline with health checks and rollback support.

workflows.name: Nightly Data Sync
workflows.description: Sync production data to analytics warehouse every night at 2 AM UTC.

workflows.name: User Onboarding Email
workflows.description: Send welcome email series to new users over their first 7 days.

workflows.name: Error Alert Escalation
workflows.description: Monitor error rates and escalate to PagerDuty when thresholds are breached.

workflows.name: Invoice Generation
workflows.description: Generate and email monthly invoices for active subscriptions.

workflows.name: Cache Invalidation
workflows.description: Invalidate CDN and application caches when content is published.

workflows.name: Backup Verification
workflows.description: Verify database backups are restorable by performing trial restores weekly.

workflows.name: Slack Standup Bot
workflows.description: Collect standup updates from team members and post summary at 10 AM.

workflows.name: PR Auto-Label
workflows.description: Automatically label pull requests based on changed file paths and labels.

workflows.name: Compliance Report
workflows.description: Generate quarterly compliance reports from audit logs and access records.
